positive: A vibrant, stylized graphic illustration of a celestial whale swimming through nebulous cosmic clouds. The whale has a clean, rounded silhouette and intricate, glowing bioluminescent patterns across its body. The background features deep purples, electric blues, and subtle magentas, rendered with a high-contrast, Art Nouveau aesthetic mixed with vaporwave elements. Focus on crisp lines, perfect symmetry, and a central composition suitable for a wearable graphic tee. The style should resemble digital ink on canvas, highly detailed, with smooth, airbrushed gradients and strong visual depth. Minimalist typography placeholder, perfect for direct apparel printing.
